creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon May 20 08:58:29 2013
New Revision: 318586
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318586

Log:
  - Update to 0.2.0
  
  PR:		178588
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Deleted:
  head/games/lordsawar/files/patch-configure
  head/games/lordsawar/files/patch-tarhelper.cpp
Modified:
  head/games/lordsawar/Makefile
  head/games/lordsawar/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/lordsawar/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/lordsawar/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/lordsawar/Makefile	Mon May 20 08:55:29 2013	(r318585)
+++ head/games/lordsawar/Makefile	Mon May 20 08:58:29 2013	(r318586)
@@ -1,35 +1,30 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	lordsawar
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.9
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SAVANNAH}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
+MASTER_SITES=	SAVANNAH
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Warlords II clone
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	glademm-2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libglademm24 \
-		gnet-2:${PORTSDIR}/net/gnet2 \
-		uuid:${PORTSDIR}/misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid \
-		tar:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libtar
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	bjam:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boost-jam \
 		${LOCALBASE}/include/boost/shared_ptr.hpp:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boost-libs
+LIB_DEPENDS=	tar:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libtar \
+		uuid:${PORTSDIR}/misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid \
+		gnet-2:${PORTSDIR}/net/gnet2
 
 USES=		gettext
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-USE_GNOME=	intltool
+USE_GNOME=	gnomehier gtkmm24
 USE_SDL=	sdl image mixer
+USE_GCC=	any
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-boost-includedir=${LOCALBASE}/include
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--disable-nls \
-		--with-boost-includedir=${LOCALBASE}/include/
-
-CONFIGURE_ENV+=	LIBS="${PTHREAD_LIBS}"
 CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
